storage/field_span_acquisition.comment: 25 ns floor; de-elided by audit-2026-07-11 H1, real cost is ~0.3 ns of address arithmetic via an opaque page pointer.

storage/chunk_field_write_read_iteration.comment: Bootstrap ceiling: de-elided by audit-2026-07-11 H1 (previously compiled to an empty loop; old CI samples are meaningless). Set from local arm64 medians x6 headroom; recalibrate to 2x-max once 10 CI artifacts carry real samples.
